attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SWIT.	INV_TRANS_ID                  	,
SWIT.	SRC_BATCH_ID                  	,
SWIT.	SOURCE_PROFILE_ID             	,
SWIT.	SOURCE_CUSTOMER_ID            	,
SWIT.	PARTNO_MAP_ID                 	,
SWIT.	STATUS                        	,
SWIT.	INVENTORY_DATE                	,
SWIT.	ORG_INVENTORY_DATE            	,
SWIT.	VENDOR_PART_NO                	,
SWIT.	MFG_PART_NO                   	,
SWIT.	PRODUCT_DESC                  	,
SWIT.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC        	,
SWIT.	REPORTED_EXTENDED_PRICE_LC    	,
SWIT.	CONVERSION_RATE               	,
SWIT.	REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD       	,
SWIT.	CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE          	,
SWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE               	,
SWIT.	ORG_VALUATION_PRICE           	,
SWIT.	SPECIAL_PRICE                 	,
SWIT.	QTY_ON_HAND                   	,
SWIT.	COMMITTED_QTY                 	,
SWIT.	STOCK_QTY                     	,
SWIT.	ON_ORDER_QTY                  	,
SWIT.	BACKORDER_QTY                 	,
SWIT.	IN_TRANSIT_QTY                	,
SWIT.	OTHER_QTY                     	,
SWIT.	PROD_FAMILY                   	,
SWIT.	PROD_CATEGORY                 	,
SWIT.	PROD_TYPE                     	,
SWIT.	PROD_GROUP                    	,
SWIT.	BUSINESS_GROUP                	,
SWIT.	BUSINESS_UNIT                 	,
SWIT.	POSTED_DATE                   	,
SWIT.	POST_FISC_YR                  	,
SWIT.	POST_FISC_PRD                 	,
SWIT.	INV_FISC_YR                   	,
SWIT.	INV_FISC_PRD                  	,
SWIT.	PARSED_PART_NUM               	,
SWIT.	PARSED                        	,
SWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE_NAME            	,
SWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE    	,
SWIT.	ADJUSTED_FLAG                 	,
SWIT.	ACTIVE_FLAG                   	,
SWIT.	CREATED_BY                    	,
SWIT.	CREATION_DATE                 	,
SWIT.	UPDATED_BY                    	,
SWIT.	LAST_UPDATE_DATE              	,
SWIT.	REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE        	,
SWIT.	CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC       	,
SWIT.	CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE          	,
SWIT.	CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC       	,
SWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE_LC            	,
SWIT.	OBSOLETE_QUANTITY             	,
SWIT.	INVENTORY_LOCATION            	,
SWIT.	INV_TYPE                      	,
SWIT.	SECOND_SOURCE                 	,
SWIT.	AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE         	,
SWIT.	AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE_LC      	,
SWIT.	VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE        	,
SWIT.	BATCH_ID                      	,
SWIT.	ACTION_CODE                   	,
SWIT.	START_ACTIVE_DATE             	,
SWIT.	END_ACTIVE_DATE  				,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE					,
SWIT.AVG_PRICE_LC
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS SWIT
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_DISTI_INVENTORY_TRX_LINE WDI
WHERE WDI.DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT = SWIT.INV_TRANS_ID )
